rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Implementation-level signal routing should be expressed through assignments in the implementation annex.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules when inserting AGREE contracts.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE expressions.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
Avoid unsafe numeric or Boolean encodings of event ports or opaque data types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not encode AADL event ports or opaque data as numeric or Boolean values in AGREE.
